title: engines.engine_candidate_suggested
description: ADR-040 Layer 2 (catch-state) — emitted by kit/scripts/core/cwos-catch-state.js when the rule-tier (R1–R6) or LLM fallback produces an engine candidate at confidence ≥ 0.6. Payload feeds Layer 3's intent-contract pre-fill if the founder invokes the suggested engine within PRE_FILL_WINDOW_TURNS (v1=10) turns. WS-298.

trigger_signals.description: Names of rules that fired (e.g. ['R1','R3']) or ['LLM'] for fallback

active_engine_context.description: Engine id the founder has already invoked, or null when no context

suggested_target.description: Extracted target ref (file path, prog-* name, design-doc, plan, WS id)

suggested_contract.description: Pre-filled Layer-3 intent contract draft per ENGINE_CONTRACT_DEFAULTS
